title: 6 sort and uniq Commands for Quick Dedup and Ranking
summary: Clean and rank repeated text fast with sort and uniq commands for deduplication, duplicate checks, frequency reports, and field-based ordering.

test_environment.runtime: sort and uniq available in a POSIX shell

verification_setup: Confirm sort and uniq are installed.
Replace the example file names before running the commands.
Use sample text that contains duplicates or sortable fields.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/sort_and_uniq_commands_for_quick_dedup_and_ranking.sh with real local files.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example file names with local files that contain duplicates or sortable fields.
